market_pulse: EDC Week momentum carrying into Memorial Day weekend with major openings (OMNIA Dayclub, Palm Tree Beach Club) and high-profile talent deployments across premium venues creating competitive pressure on social engagement.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leveraging celebrity appearances and VIP moments for viral reach (LeBron James at OMNIA, Sofia Vergara, celebrity endorsements). LIV not capitalizing on similar talent moments in social posts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Secure VIP/influencer photo ops for upcoming LIV events and push behind-the-scenes content showing talent prep and arrival moments.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using countdown timers, story sequences, and event day recaps to drive urgency. LIV social presence lacks real-time event momentum feeds.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 24-hour countdown content series for major LIV events; use stories for pre-event hype and real-time updates during events.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, and Hakkasan pushing exclusive DJ collaborations and b2b sets as story angles. Tiësto at LIV (May 15) not fully leveraged in social context.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post exclusive Tiësto rehearsal/soundcheck content; highlight rare b2b opportunities at LIV that competitors can't match.

influencer_activity.mention: Diplo at XS Nightclub, high-profile performance during EDC Week getting significant social traction.
LeBron James coverage at OMNIA Dayclub grand opening - celebrity power move that drove massive earned media.
Celebrity sightings at OMNIA (LeBron, Sofia Vergara, Mehcad Brooks) creating viral moments and paparazzi coverage.

liv_outreach_targets.rationale: Already activated at XS; potential cross-promotion with LIV for unique b2b or exclusive set.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_tie_in: Exclusive Diplo at LIV residency announcement or feature guest spot.

liv_outreach_targets.rationale: Consumer-friendly producer; strong TikTok following. Could amplify LIV's music credibility.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_tie_in: Music production collaboration or exclusive studio session at LIV.

story_activity.summary: Grand opening announcement with LeBron James and celebrity guests; motorcycle stunt and world-record moment.
Calvin Harris 6-hour set countdown for Saturday (May 18); capacity warning for guest lists.
New venue debut; Zedd, Above & Beyond, and Kygo performances announced for Memorial Day weekend.
EDC Week underground picks announced: Ray Volpe (Wed), James Hype b2b Meduza (Thu), Wax Motif (Fri).

venues.summary: David Guetta at LIV Beach drew record 65,000 sq ft capacity crowds during EDC Week; Tiësto residency ongoing (May 15). Social performance moderate.

raw_posts.content_summary: David Guetta simultaneous set at LIV Beach & EBC drew capacity crowd; largest single-day attendance since opening.
Tiësto at LIV Las Vegas residency announced for May 15, 2026.
Knock2 takeover at LIV Nightclub during EDC Week; underground house flavor.

venues.summary: Record-breaking EDC Week performance with David Guetta; capacity crowds and high social buzz. Strong day-life positioning with Knock2 takeover.

raw_posts.content_summary: David Guetta drew record 65,000 sq ft capacity; LIV Beach now positioned as EDC Week destination for day pools.
Knock2 event video content showing high-energy crowd during EDC Week Thursday night.

venues.summary: Diplo headliner during EDC Week received strongest immediate social attention of the week per nocovervegas.com; The Chainsmokers performance in evening. Premium talent roster driving engagement.

raw_posts.content_summary: Diplo at XS Nightclub with high-profile social media coverage; TikTok feature from @vegas account.
The Chainsmokers performance at XS in evening received immediate social traction.

venues.summary: Calvin Harris 6-hour day set on Saturday (May 18) transformed pool party into full-day festival; guest lists closed by noon; Subtronics and Kygo upcoming. Strong EDC Week execution.

raw_posts.content_summary: Calvin Harris 6-hour set on Saturday; lily pad daybeds at capacity from opening; women's guest list closed before noon.
Subtronics May 14 performance announced; bass-heavy crowd draw during EDC Week.
Kygo appearance announced for May 23 (Memorial Day weekend); upcoming high-capacity draw.

venues.summary: OMNIA Dayclub & Skybar GRAND OPENING (May 17-19) with LeBron James, Sofia Vergara, celebrity arrivals, world-record motorcycle stunt; major market disruptor. Massive earned media and viral moments.

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA Dayclub grand opening with LeBron James, Sofia Vergara, Mehcad Brooks in VIP; celebrity photo ops and paparazzi coverage.
LeBron James arrival at OMNIA; Getty images coverage; private setup and VIP treatment; celebrity sightings amplified.
RÜFÜS DU SOL opening day performance; 100-foot motorcycle stunt during opening weekend; world-record moment.
OMNIA Dayclub opening footage showing celebrity crowd, Trojan Horse production element, viral stunt moments.

venues.summary: Omnia nightclub venue at Caesars; referenced alongside dayclub opening but limited recent social activity. Part of larger Tao Group expansion.

raw_posts.content_summary: Omnia nightclub mentioned as sister venue to new Omnia Dayclub; bridge connecting both concepts for multi-layered experience.

venues.summary: Underground EDC Week positioning with Ray Volpe (Wed), James Hype b2b Meduza (Thu), Wax Motif (Fri) in Funktion-One room. Consistent execution, niche credibility.

Ayu Dayclub pool party afters announced; Zouk Group weekly DJ announcements for summer season.

venues.summary: Charlotte de Witte Thursday night techno performance was 'most artistically significant night of EDC Week 2026'; consistent quality execution. Strong specialist reputation.

Hakkasan nightclub at MGM Grand promoting world-class DJ talent; 80,000 sq ft five-level venue experience.

venues.summary: NEW VENUE DEBUT (May 2026) at MGM Grand with Zedd, Above & Beyond, Kygo, Chris Lake, Tiësto, Louis the Child announced. Strong launch lineup positioning for Memorial Day weekend.

Palm Tree Beach Club redefining daylife on Strip; upcoming Tiësto (May 23), Louis the Child (May 29) performances; Kygo announced.
